channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 25th March
item.description:
Edge deterioration CW 600x1000x50mm Road closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 25th March
item.description:
Edge deterioration CW 400x6000x60mm Road closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 25th March
item.description:
Edge deterioration CW 700x1600x66mm Road closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 25th March
item.description:
15DB Pothole CW 600x500x50mm Road closure with 15db (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 25th March
item.description:
Loose rattling cover Please lift and reset 600x600mm approx 2 way lights Stats (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 25th March
item.description:
15DB Fway abrupt level difference 600mm x 500mm x 20mm around BT cover STAT PLAN REQUIRED Please make safe with M60 materials Fway closure TM required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long snapped branch hanging down, 25th March
item.description:
Long branch that has snapped and is now hanging low vertically and may possibly snap off and cause damage to passing traffic or cyclists especially with current high winds.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, The Park, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another pothole, 25th March
item.description:
Another Pothole getting bigger and deeper as the road is not being maintained properly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 25th March
item.description:
Rocking slab 600mm x 600mm x 20mm Please take up and relay STAT PLAN REQUIRED Fway closure TM required (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small square metal drain missing its cover in the road heading towards town., 25th March
item.description:
Its on the side heading into town I think after College awn but can't be 100% sure exactly where.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Emmanuel Gardens, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
